items.name: Beanie
items.description:
The Blue Winter Cap brings a crisp, cool tone to your avatar’s winter wardrobe. Finished in a striking shade of blue, this cap complements casual outfits, snowy maps, and seasonal role-play with style. Match it with your favorite coat, scarf, or streetwear look for a standout winter statement.

✅ Join the Group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about

🏛️ Classic Limiteds

A LOVECHELSIE bag is an essential in every closet.
